# Competitive Signal Report — Enterprise AI Platform (Wednesday, 22 July 2026)

> **Bottom line:** Competitors are focusing on executive leadership changes and financial reporting, while also forging strategic partnerships to expand their enterprise AI capabilities. Kore.ai should leverage its proven analyst validation and robust platform architecture to highlight differentiation against these evolving market dynamics.

## Three signals that matter
### Five9 leadership changes signal strategic pivot
**What happened —** Five9 announced a new CTO, Sales Chief, and Strategy Executive on (2026-07-21) [The AI Software Report](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikAFBVV95cUxQRF9VNXB6cjBFcmF5OXViS0s5NDhVRmZxZXJ6aTB4bGVaM3dmZV83WjlKNHRqbE83dG9saUo3UjBnOW5aYUVQYzlFMm95V19YMmR6Sk05QWRINEFrUVZNT1Y1WWlxQVJPcUJHemxIQ1hOa0kxQnNiT1Z2WGp4VFNNMS1JUjVhYUE0WTI0bWlRYkg?oc=5). The company also announced its Q2 2026 financial results will be reported on August 6, 2026, as per (2026-07-20) [Business Wire](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxOOWlPb1ZGaUZ0NmFQUE9MUm55OEhaY3FBVFJaZUdnV05Kd0JvUC0tTS1EUi1RTWVCZ1YxTThCWUJFQURKWDVPcTktbHVHbnNKaTRIYTNvcHBJQ3dEdDAwb2RQbDMtdmpFVmxaTDlnbTRNb1ZuZVJ4eFFUZWh4UG9Xc2t3ekZwVnJWV2JCLXF0bWhiYXZ4dzl3X3c0XzM4dU40R01lOEswTTVKaUFuOTgwTGdnbGZsM3NkUGE2QUZydHMxRE53SWc?oc=5) and [Moomoo](https://news.google.?oc=5).
**What it means for Kore.ai —** These leadership changes and upcoming financial reports suggest Five9 is navigating a period of strategic recalibration, potentially to address market pressures on its seat-based model. Kore.ai can highlight its proven, analyst-validated platform for true omnichannel CX and its cost-per-outcome pricing model, contrasting with Five9's potential structural challenges.

### Glean expands enterprise AI reach via strategic partnerships
**What happened —** Glean has formed partnerships with GleekOps and LTM, as reported on (2026-07-21) [EIN Presswire](https://news.google.?oc=5) and varindia.com. These collaborations aim to accelerate enterprise AI adoption and integrate enterprise knowledge into agentic AI workflows. A Glean report also highlighted that workers spend significant time fixing AI mistakes, as noted by (2026-07-20) [The HR Digest](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxQUERIbXBoMi1PYks0bXkxQkg0aFVTakVuZ1lZUmNUdEhFa0FTcS1mYldsbGtTbHpMOFlPc0dQS0s1TnhTN0F1Q1FIdjVXRGRsR29zU1l1MEgxeWIxbUpIZG1OdVJoSm16d21nWHhzN1BZajNsYVBlZ1k5X29mbWdzUzA1RG5lWmNWWEhCSDU5cl8wRVNXTzU1bFF4MFFUTVU?oc=5).
**What it means for Kore.ai —** Glean's focus on internal knowledge management and partnerships for broader AI adoption highlights a gap in direct customer-facing CX capabilities. Kore.ai can emphasize its purpose-built, omnichannel CX platform with robust enterprise integrations and proven analyst validation for customer service automation, differentiating from Glean's employee-centric focus.

### Salesforce Agentforce expands enterprise use cases
**What happened —** Formula 1® is resolving race-day issues 80% faster with Agentforce Service, as announced by (2026-07-21) [Salesforce](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiggFBVV95cUxQWHpZQUQ4cWRLV3c0VzFwMXlHZ2JEQ1NucDEyTHA1Y3BJb0RnVTBrc1l6OExaWk84YWRfeTBsVWp5aUZmNVJDRlFyWFdkTlIxdHRRLUp3Vzg0TmhGMHNyNHBfRGRrTGtMTkVnZmdpckN0dmpFTzBGWUkzTFN1RVY0N21n?oc=5). Additionally, Salesforce launched its 'SMB Growth Kit' in India, integrating Agentforce, Slack, and Tableau, as reported by (2026-07-20) NDTV Profit.
**What it means for Kore.ai —** Salesforce continues to leverage its platform breadth to drive adoption of Agentforce, particularly in specific use cases like Formula 1 and SMB markets. Kore.ai can counter by emphasizing its dedicated, enterprise-grade conversational AI platform with superior analyst validation in the CX space, and its ability to deliver true omnichannel experiences beyond CRM-centric applications.

## Signal priority table
| Competitor | Move (dated) | Threat | Kore.ai counter |
|---|---|---|---|
| Five9 | (2026-07-21) Leadership changes and Q2 2026 earnings announcement [The AI Software Report](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikAFBVV95cUxQRF9VNXB6cjBFcmF5OXViS0s5NDhVRmZxZXJ6aTB4bGVaM3dmZV83WjlKNHRqbE83dG9saUo3UjBnOW5aYUVQYzlFMm95V19YMmR6Sk05QWRINEFrUVZNT1Y1WWlxQVJPcUJHemxIQ1hOa0kxQnNiT1Z2WGp4VFNNMS1JUjVhYUE0WTI0bWlRYkg?oc=5) | High | Highlight analyst-validated platform and cost-per-outcome model. |
| Glean | (2026-07-21) Partnerships with GleekOps and LTM to expand enterprise AI adoption [EIN Presswire](https://news.google.?oc=5) | Med | Emphasize purpose-built, omnichannel CX platform with proven analyst validation. |
| Agentforce (Salesforce) | (2026-07-21) Formula 1® resolves issues 80% faster with Agentforce Service [Salesforce](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiggFBVV95cUxQWHpZQUQ4cWRLV3c0VzFwMXlHZ2JEQ1NucDEyTHA1Y3BJb0RnVTBrc1l6OExaWk84YWRfeTBsVWp5aUZmNVJDRlFyWFdkTlIxdHRRLUp3Vzg0TmhGMHNyNHBfRGRrTGtMTkVnZmdpckN0dmpFTzBGWUkzTFN1RVY0N21n?oc=5) | Med | Highlight dedicated, enterprise-grade CX platform with superior analyst validation. |
| IBM Agent Platform | (2026-07-21) Changi General Hospital and IBM to build AI-powered platform for paediatric emergency training [The Edge Singapore](https://news.google.?oc=5) | Low | Emphasize Kore.ai's leadership in conversational AI for CX and its proven track record in regulated industries. |

## Watch for
*   Continued executive shuffling at Five9 and its impact on their AI strategy.
*   Glean's ability to translate internal knowledge focus into customer-facing CX solutions.
*   Salesforce's ongoing efforts to broaden Agentforce adoption beyond specific verticals.

## Recommended actions
*   **Messaging:** Continue to emphasize Kore.ai's analyst-validated leadership in conversational AI for CX, particularly against competitors with less robust independent validation.
*   **Sales Enablement:** Arm sales teams with talking points that highlight the limitations of internal-facing AI (like Glean) versus Kore.ai's comprehensive customer-facing omnichannel platform.
*   **Product Marketing:** Develop content that clearly articulates the TCO advantages of Kore.ai's outcome-based pricing versus potential consumption-based overages from competitors.
*   **Analyst Relations:** Proactively engage with analysts to reinforce Kore.ai's strengths in determinism, governance, and true omnichannel capabilities, especially in light of competitor platform integrations and leadership changes.
*   **Competitive Intelligence:** Monitor Five9's upcoming financial results closely for indicators of their AI strategy's impact on their core business.
